title: Must Workload view split hours evenly?
excerpt:
Does Workflow allow more granular allocation of hours for a team project beyond “split evenly” and “assign to each”. 
For example, a 10 hour project with a two person team must be interpreted as 10/10 (ie, 10 hours each)…

posts.author: slbradio (Larry Berger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does Workflow allow more granular allocation of hours for a team project beyond “split evenly” and “assign to each”.

For example, a 10 hour project with a two person team must be interpreted as 10/10 (ie, 10 hours each) or 5/5 (ie, 5 hours of work by each).

We have many work cases were the workload needs to be more like 8/2 or 7/3. We’d like to be
able to specify those hours manually vs. automatically. Having to choose one of two arbitrary splits (not to mention committing to them for everything on the board) is too limiting. There are many projects where work is not evenly split.

TIA for any insight.
